source.cross_refs: privacy key derivation: src/crypto/tests/TestChipCryptoPAL.cpp TestGroup_PrivacyKeyDerivation; privacy nonce: src/transport/CryptoContext.cpp BuildPrivacyNonce

notes.security_flags: 0x81 == kPrivacyFlag (0x80) | kGroupSession (0x01); chip SessionManager sets P unconditionally for group TX
notes.aead_nonce: u8(RAW securityFlags == 0x81, P INCLUDED) || u32_LE(counter) || u64_LE(sourceNodeId). chip BuildNonce consumes PacketHeader::GetSecurityFlags() == mSecFlags.Raw(). CAUTION: the chip test struct's .nonce field shows a masked 0x01 byte, but it is unused by that test and does NOT decrypt these frames; only 0x81 does (verified with an independent Python AES-CCM implementation, 2026-07-20).
notes.privacy_key: HKDF-SHA256(IKM = operational key, salt = [], info = "PrivacyKey", L = 16)
notes.privacy_region: header bytes [4..header_len] (counter + source node id + dest group id); bytes [0..4] and ciphertext+MIC stay in the clear
notes.privacy_cipher: AES-CTR-128 with the CCM counter-block convention == AES-CCM encrypt with empty AAD, tag discarded (byte-verified against the frames below)
